description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request to the master branch. Use four ubuntu-22.04 jobs: mpi, mpi-stubs-fft, mpi-stubs-kokkos-exact-fft, and bigbig. Each job checks out the repository, configures and builds using cmake with specific presets, and runs tests with ctest except for bigbig and mpi-stubs-kokkos-exact-fft. Upload build artifacts for the mpi job.
